response: Phone imagine a season where Samford played twelve games in total. Phone they won twice as many games as they lost, with no ties involved. Phone calculating the number of wins and losses, we find six wins and three losses. Phone in each win, Samford scored an average of twenty-eight points per game. Phone in each loss, they scored an average of fourteen points per game. Phone multiplying six wins by twenty-eight points gives one hundred sixty-eight points. Phone multiplying three losses by fourteen points gives forty-two points. Phone adding one hundred sixty-eight and forty-two together gives two hundred ten total points. Phone that season, Samford scored two hundred ten points in total.
